title: Indiana sports facility developer’s home, business raided by FBI
description:
The home and office of local developer Andy Card were raided Thursday by federal law enforcement amid accusations that he misused millions of dollars intended for a sports facility project in northern Indiana.

title: ChamberCare program expanding to local chambers statewide
description:
The Indiana Chamber of Commerce and Indy Chamber said the goal of increasing access to ChamberCare is to make affordable, more predictable health benefit options easier for small businesses to learn about and evaluate.
